title: AI personal
subtitle: Good lighting helps · Pick your exercise first, then press Start Camera
tipDistance: • Stand 2–3 metres from the camera so your full body (head to feet) is visible
tipLighting: • Good lighting · Select your exercise first, then press Start
how1: • Your camera sends live video to the AI
how2: • The AI detects your body position in real time
how3: • Your joint angles are measured every frame
how4: • The AI recognises which exercise you're doing
how5: • Reps are counted automatically as you move
how6: • Your form is scored on balance and range of motion
wsError: WebSocket error — make sure the backend is running on port 8000.
notLoggedIn: Not logged in — please log out and back in.
cameraDenied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions and try again.
cameraActive: Camera active — stand 2–3 m back so your full body is visible
noPoseFeedback: No pose detected — step back so your full body is visible
